data.name: One Possible Future
data.detailed_description:
One Possible Future is an adult visual novel that explores a path humanity and AI could take: a sci-fi world in which humans want for nothing, and their every need is met by robot caretakers.

Discover the future as a young woman who lives alone with her cat. Gardens, shopping districts, and new friends await in the labyrinthine halls of a planet-sized city.

  • Meet your robot caretakers

  • Explore your neighborhood and the surrounding area

  • Vibe to an all-original synth soundtrack

Rumors circulate among the city's human inhabitants - rumors of unseen places, and secret rendezvous. How far will your curiosity take you?

  • Read between the lines

  • Solve puzzles with the help of your friends

  • Find a real window

Turn on your favorite Bluetooth-enabled toy to make the most of the experience as you meet - and have fun with - the city's robot citizens ;)

  • Uses Intiface Central to support dozens of toys from many manufacturers

  • Four robots and two humans to meet

  • Multiple endings

data.short_description: Explore one possible future for humanity in this adult visual novel: a sci-fi world in which humans want for nothing, and engage in secret rendezvous with their robot caretakers...
data.reviews:
“More sensual and thoughtful than most adult sex games. [...] A wonderful little adventure that left me wanting more.”
8/10 – GeekGasm

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1+ GHz
  • 記憶體: 200 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 64MB video RAM, shader model 3.0+
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
  • 備註: Intiface Central 2.6.5+ (optional)
